name: Kagemusha of the Six Samurai
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Body Double of the Six Warmen
desc: During either player's turn, when exactly 1 face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control is targeted by a Spell Card, Trap Card, or card effect that could have targeted this card: You can activate this effect; that Spell/Trap/effect now targets this face-up card on the field, instead.
flavor: During either player's turn, when exactly 1 face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control is targeted by a Spell Card, Trap Card, or card effect that could have targeted this card: You can activate this effect; that Spell/Trap/effect now targets this face-up card on the field, instead.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Changes the targets of monster effects
Changes the targets of Spell Cards
Changes the targets of Trap Cards
